summary: Tested AI Website Builder enhancements: Quick Templates feature (10 industry templates), Netlify deployment fix (text/html content-type), and Companies House API verification. All 23 backend tests passed. Frontend UI verified working correctly.
features_tested: POST /api/ai-websites/generate - Generate website with template content
POST /api/ai-websites/{id}/deploy with platform=netlify - Verified HTML content-type
POST /api/company-profile/check-name - Companies House API working with real key
Full workflow: Select template -> Generate -> Deploy to Netlify -> Verify site serves HTML

templates_list_api.description: GET /api/ai-websites/templates/list - Returns all 10 industry templates with required fields

template_by_id_api.description: GET /api/ai-websites/templates/{id} - Returns specific template with id field

netlify_deployment_fix.description: Verified Netlify deployment returns text/html content-type (FIX VERIFIED)

companies_house_api.description: POST /api/company-profile/check-name - Working with real API key

full_workflow.description: Complete workflow: Template -> Generate -> Deploy -> Verify HTML

netlify_deployment.issue: Netlify deployment was returning text/plain instead of text/html
netlify_deployment.fix: Changed from ZIP upload to file digest API with SHA1 hash
netlify_deployment.verification: Deployed site https://test-iter5-saas.netlify.app returns Content-Type: text/html; charset=UTF-8

companies_house_api.description: Companies House API integration with real key

frontend_verification.ai_website_builder_page: Loads correctly with all 10 templates displayed
frontend_verification.template_selection: Clicking template populates description and color scheme
frontend_verification.tabs: Templates, Create, Preview, Deploy, History tabs all visible

seed_data_creation: Test user and workspace created in MongoDB for iteration 5 testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Quick Templates feature tests passing. Netlify deployment fix verified - sites now serve text/html correctly. Companies House API working with real key. Previous iteration (4) had 32 tests, this iteration adds 23 new tests specifically for the new features.
